name: HERE Maps API
what_it_does: Enterprise mapping and location platform providing geocoding, routing, real-time traffic, fleet management APIs, and highly accurate map data especially strong in Europe and Asia.
use_cases: Fleet management and logistics routing optimization
Address validation and geocoding for enterprise workflows
Real-time traffic-aware routing for delivery agents
Toll cost calculation for routing applications
not_for: Consumer apps needing rich POI data for end-users (Google Maps is better)
Small teams without enterprise location requirements
Simple one-off geocoding without routing needs
best_when: You need enterprise-grade fleet routing, logistics optimization, or location services with strong European/Asian map accuracy.
avoid_when: You're building a consumer-facing map experience or need the most comprehensive global POI coverage.

auth.notes: API key for simple access. OAuth2 for production and enterprise use. HERE Platform uses token-based auth with scopes.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go after free tier; Geocoding from $1/1000 requests
pricing.notes: Generous free tier. Competitive enterprise pricing with volume discounts. No credit card required for free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by API; typically 30-100 requests/second on free tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Structured error responses with title and detail fields. Documentation can be inconsistent across API versions.
known_agent_gotchas: Multiple API versions coexist (v6, v7, v8) with different response formats
HERE Geocoding & Search vs Geocoder API are different products with different endpoints
OAuth2 tokens expire - agents need token refresh logic for long-running workflows
Rate limits on free tier are lower than Google Maps for high-throughput agents
API key and OAuth2 have different base URLs for some services
